g.title: n_eval
g.text: flat: 1 000 s per off-track trajectory point

g.title: n_final_eval
g.text: captures improvements from last breed step)

g.title: n_select
g.text: winner = argmin(fitness) over k random candidates

g.title: n_crossover
g.text: child[i] = p1[i] if rand() < 0.5 else p2[i]

g.title: n_commands
g.text: Reconstruct best trajectory at full resolution
